basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Jammu website. The last date to submit the application form is 15-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/women and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech./MS(R) or equivalent in CSE/ECE/EE/Microelectronics/VLSI Design with GATE or equivalent National-Level Examination, B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. in relevant subjects with GATE or equivalent National-Level Examination
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech./MS(R) or equivalent degree in CSE/ECE/EE/Microelectronics/VLSI Design and allied subjects with 65% marks or equivalent and having qualified GATE or an equivalent National-Level Examination. B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. in CSE/ECE/EE/Electronics/Microelectronics/VLSI Design/Embedded Systems and allied subjects with 65% marks or equivalent and having qualified valid GATE or an equivalent National-Level Examination. 5% marks relaxation for ST/SC/PH candidates.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (as per institute Norms) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Jammu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.E./M.Tech./MS(R) or equivalent degree in CSE/ECE/EE/Microelectronics/VLSI Design and allied subjects with 65% marks or equivalent and having qualified GATE or an equivalent National-Level Examination. B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. in CSE/ECE/EE/Electronics/Microelectronics/VLSI Design/Embedded Systems and allied subjects with 65% marks or equivalent and having qualified valid GATE or an equivalent National-Level Examination. 5% marks relaxation for ST/SC/PH candidates.

content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (as per institute Norms) Per Month

IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is 15-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at IIT Jammu.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.E./M.Tech./MS(R) or equivalent degree in CSE/ECE/EE/Microelectronics/VLSI Design with GATE, or a B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. in relevant subjects with GATE.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 28 years, with relaxations applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- Per Month plus HRA as per institute norms.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online through the official IIT Jammu website.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Jammu offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/women and physically handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
